blockedLists.title: Blocked filter lists
blockedLists.description: List of filter list URLs that users cannot enable

forcedLists.title: Forced filter lists
forcedLists.description: List of filter list URLs that are always enabled

disableFiltering.title: Disable content filtering
disableFiltering.description: When true, all content filtering is disabled

disableCosmeticFiltering.title: Disable cosmetic filtering
disableCosmeticFiltering.description: When true, cosmetic/procedural filters are disabled

disableLogger.title: Disable network logger
disableLogger.description: When true, the network request logger is disabled

whitelist.title: Whitelisted sites
whitelist.description: Sites that should not be filtered

blocklist.title: Blocklisted sites
blocklist.description: Sites where filtering is always active
